headline: A Look At Tapestry (TPR) Valuation As Shares Cool After Recent Strong One Year Return
summary: Tapestry stock performance snapshot Tapestry (TPR) sits in the spotlight after another day of trading, giving you a fresh chance to weigh its recent moves against the company’s latest financial profile and brand mix. The stock closed at US$138.49, with returns up about 5% over the past week but down roughly 5% over the past month and 12% over the past 3 months. Over longer periods, total returns stand at about 73% over the past year, roughly 2.7x over 3 years and about 2.5x over 5 years. See...

headline: Can Arhaus Offset Tariff Headwinds With Domestic Manufacturing?
summary: ARHS leans on domestic upholstery production and diversified sourcing to manage tariff pressures and protect margins.
